pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the Spring Boot parent POM version to 3.3.13 to align with the Java 21 migration and Spring Boot 3.x requirements.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x requires Java 17+ and uses Jakarta EE namespaces; using the old 2.6.x parent with Java 21 and Spring Boot 3.x dependencies causes classpath conflicts and missing API errors (javax vs jakarta).

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property to 21 to target the new JDK baseline.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project compiles against Java 17, failing to utilize Java 21 features and potentially causing incompatibility with libraries requiring Java 21.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Spring Boot version property to 3.3.13 to match the parent POM and ensure dependency consistency.
pom.xml.why_exists: Mismatched Spring Boot versions between properties and parent can lead to dependency resolution issues and runtime class conflicts.
